product.shippingText: We offer next business day delivery for orders placed before 2:00 PM Monday to Friday. Orders placed after that will be delivered within two business days. Saturdays, Sundays and public holidays are excluded.
product.returnsText: We accept returns within 14 days of receiving the goods in original condition. Please notify us by email before sending the product back.
product.returnsPackaging: The product must be in its original packaging, well protected for transport.
product.review1Text: Very happy with my purchase! The quality is excellent, assembly was easy and quick. The furniture looks exactly like in the photos. Highly recommended!
product.review2Text: We furnished our entire office with this furniture. Exceptional quality for the price, precise craftsmanship and fast delivery. We will definitely be back for the next order.

shop.heroTitle: Explore the diverse collection of OfficeLabs Co
shop.heroTagline: Don't miss our collection — you won't regret it.
shop.ctaRightText: We'll understand your needs, find the right approach and create the furniture solution made just for you.

about.heroSub:
We create spaces
 you actually want to be in.
about.storyTitle:
Is your space
working for you —
or against you?
about.storyP1: OfficeLabs Co was born from a simple observation: people who love their work also love the space where they do it. It's no coincidence. Environment shapes thought. The desk shapes habit. The room shapes character.
about.storyP2: We don't sell furniture to fill a room. We sell furniture because we believe the environment you choose is a silent statement about who you want to be. And the people for whom that matters — they are our people.
about.storyP3: We started with four series, each with a different character and philosophy. Not to cover the market, but to find the right person for the right piece. Because the furniture that truly works for you isn't what you need — it's what you recognise yourself in.
about.beliefsTitle: Three things we believe in without reservation.
about.belief1Text: Space is not neutral. Every hour spent in a given environment shapes your habits, attention, and identity. The desk is not just furniture — it is the frame in which thought happens.
about.belief2Text: We don't add features to impress. We remove everything unnecessary until only what matters remains. The result is furniture that looks better ten years later than on the day of purchase.
about.belief3Text: We design furniture that stays. Not furniture you replace in five years. Furniture you pass on. That's why every piece meets standards most manufacturers would never bother with.
about.collTitle:
Find the series
that speaks to your character.
about.collSub: Four series, four ways to declare who you are in the space where you live and work.
about.astraHeadline: For those for whom less truly means more.
about.astraText: Minimalism not as compromise, but as choice. Clean lines, stripped form, zero visual weight.
about.terraText: Warm wood, natural materials, cosiness that isn't an apology. Because a home office deserves the same attention as any other room.
about.novaHeadline: Handcraft in a world of mass production.
about.novaText: Every piece bears the marks of craft. For connoisseurs — people for whom an object's story has value.
about.loftText: Metal and solid wood, contrasts and will. For the bold — those who don't want their space to look like everyone else's.
about.ctaText: Browse all series and find the furniture you'll want to spend your time with.

bnpl.disclaimer: Financing is provided by the respective partner. Approval is subject to credit assessment.
bnpl.tbiDesc: Interest-free consumer credit up to 12 months. Fast online application.
bnpl.credDesc: Online loan with fixed interest. Approval in 15 minutes.
bnpl.ucbDesc: Consumer loan with competitive terms. Approval within 24 hours.

slides.astraSubtitle: Clean lines, carefully selected materials and functionality that never sacrifices beauty. The Astra series was created for those who see simplicity as a form of luxury.
slides.loftSubtitle: Raw steel meets warm wood — the Loft series brings the spirit of the urban loft directly into your home. Character, durability and style in one.
slides.terraSubtitle: Inspired by nature — solid oak, soft ochre and earthy tones that make every space more inviting. The Terra series is furniture that feels like home.
slides.novaSubtitle: Organic forms, light surfaces and delicate details. The Nova series brings freshness and lightness — furniture designed to inspire every day.

contact.metaDesc: Get in touch with us for questions about products, orders or partnerships.
contact.title: How can we help?
contact.sub: Our team is available Monday to Friday for any questions.

delivery.metaDesc: Delivery information — timeframes, methods and pricing.
delivery.title: Fast & free delivery
delivery.sub: We deliver with Speedy and Econt anywhere in the country — free of charge.
delivery.s1Body: We work with Speedy and Econt courier services. When ordering, choose your preferred courier and method — home delivery or courier office pickup.
delivery.s3Body: Every product is individually packed with multi-layer protection — cardboard, foam and stretch film. Furniture ships disassembled with assembly instructions included. Average handling time is 1 business day.
delivery.callout: Upon delivery, inspect the parcel in the courier's presence. If you notice visible damage — note it on the delivery receipt. Damage found after signing without remarks is difficult to claim.
delivery.s4Body: Orders placed before 2:00 PM on business days are processed the same day. You will receive an email with a tracking number immediately after dispatch.

returns.metaDesc: Return policy and warranty information for OfficeLabs Co.
returns.title: 14 days, no questions
returns.sub: Not satisfied? We accept returns within 14 days of receiving your order.
returns.s1Body: We accept returns up to 14 days from the date of receipt. The product must be in its original condition — intact, in original packaging, with no signs of use or assembly.
returns.step1: Contact us at info@officelabs.bg with your order number.
returns.step2: We will confirm the return and send instructions within 24 hours.
returns.step3: Pack the product in its original packaging and hand it to a courier.
returns.step4: After receipt and inspection — we refund within 5 business days.
returns.s3Body: The amount is refunded to the original payment method within 5 business days of receiving and inspecting the returned product.
returns.callout: We do not accept returns of products that have been assembled or used, with damaged packaging not noted at delivery, or ordered to custom specifications.
returns.s5Body: If you received a defective product — contact us within 48 hours of delivery with photos of the issue. We will arrange a replacement or full refund at our expense.

faq.metaDesc: Answers to the most common questions about orders, delivery, payment and products.
faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.sub: Can't find the answer? Email us at info@officelabs.bg.
faq.q1: How do I place an order?
faq.a1: Select a product from our store, add it to your cart and proceed to checkout. The process takes under 3 minutes.
faq.q2: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a2: We accept cash on delivery and online card payment. Card payments are processed as priority orders.
faq.a3: You can cancel an order within 2 hours of placing it by contacting us at info@officelabs.bg. After dispatch, cancellation is not possible — the return procedure applies.
faq.a4: Yes. During checkout you can provide company details for a VAT invoice. The invoice is sent to the provided email within 24 hours.
faq.a5: To Sofia — 1–2 business days. Nationwide — 2–4 business days. Orders placed before 2:00 PM on a business day ship the same day.
faq.q6: Do you deliver to both home addresses and courier offices?
faq.a6: Yes. During checkout you choose between home delivery or pickup at a Speedy / Econt office.
faq.a7: Yes. Right after dispatch you receive an email with a tracking number from the courier company.
faq.a8: Furniture ships disassembled for safe transport, with detailed assembly instructions. Assembly is straightforward and takes 20–40 minutes.
faq.q9: Where can I find product dimensions?
faq.a9: Exact dimensions are listed on each product page under the 'Description' tab. Feel free to contact us with any questions.
faq.q10: Do you offer samples or custom furniture?
faq.a10: We do not send material samples. Custom furniture is available for corporate clients — please get in touch.
faq.q11: How long do I have to return a product?
faq.a11: 14 days from the date of receipt, provided the product is intact in its original packaging.
faq.a12: For standard returns — costs are the customer's responsibility. For defective or incorrect products — we cover all costs.
